DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER WAIVED/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF HAROLD SHAIN APPEARS IN PRO-PER. DEFT RICHARD CHAMPION, IN PRO-PER, DOES NOT APPEAR. DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO SECOND DEFT CLAUDIA METHKIN ON 11-21-95. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF AND AGAINST DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMPION, RICHARD METHKIN, CLAUDIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2059 MARKET STREET #28, SAN FRANCISCO $715.85 RENT, $219.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $934.85, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT & DAMAGE AMOUNT WAS $1,741.85 MINUS $950.00 FOR DEFT'S PREPAID LAST MONTHS RENT AND $75.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT WHICH IS RETAINED BY PLTF. TOTAL EXCLUDING COSTS: $715.85.
